data.Modification: Succinic anhydride labeling reagent light form (N-term & K)/Methylmalonylation on Serine
Removal of initiator methionine from protein N-terminus, then acetylation of the new N-terminus
Loss of arginine due to transpeptidation/Deletion of R
Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G

project.title: SW480 N-terminal peptide analysis
project.projectDescription: N-terminal peptide analysis of SW480 cell line for Nt-formylation.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: N-terminal peptide enrichment which described in iNrich method paper [pmid:32267142] on SW480 cell line.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MS-GF+ search on variable modification in mods.txt. uniprot human reference database were used
